ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing item is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the clothing item is designed */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the clothing item is suitable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the style was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement point */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the measurement point belongs to */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement point (e.g., waist, hip, thigh) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_points_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 18, 20, 22) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the size chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is designed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement point the measurement is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES measurement_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who left the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the fit (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the comfort (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the fit preference */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the fit preference is for */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit preference (e.g., waist, hip, thigh) */,
  "preference_value" REAL /* Value of the fit preference */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the fit (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the comfort (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_preferences_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who the size recommendation is for */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the size recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the fit (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the comfort (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
